result:
All 30 tests pass. The v2 commands added to the existing implementation:

- `status` — lists staged files or `(none)`
- `diff <c1> <c2>` — compares file lists between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- `checkout <hash>` — restores working directory files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- `reset <hash>` — updates HEAD and clears index without touching working directory files
- `rm <file>` — removes a file from the staging index
- `show <hash>` — displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent
